meaning: n.(思想)守旧者,抱残守缺的人
examples: He sounds like such an old fogey !
Come to the disco and stop being such an old fogey!
Isn't that old fogey Boris's grandson come from Roman?
We may have sounded old-fogeyish when we said these things worried us, but sometimes it pays to be an old fogey.
Eddie is, of course, a voice from the past, an old fogey who provokes the relative youngsters to defend more enlightened positions.
